name: RELAPSING POLYCHONDRITIS
definition: rare debilitating multisystem inflammatory + autoimmune disorder characterized by recurrent

demographics.Etiology: acquired metabolic disorder (? abnormal acid mucopolysaccharide metabolism) /
demographics.Histo: loss of cytoplasm in chondrocytes; plasma cell and lymphocyte infiltration

discriminating_features: ectasia + collapsibility (← cartilaginous destruction) of trachea and mainstem bronchi

Respiratory tract (in up to 70%): ectasia + collapsibility (← cartilaginous destruction) of trachea and mainstem bronchi
Cardiovascular (in 15-46%): aortic aneurysm (4-10%), mostly in ascending aorta, may be multiple / dissecting
obliterating vasculitis in medium-sized + large arteries
Bone: erosive changes in carpal bones resembling rheumatoid arthritis
soft-tissue swelling around joints + styloid process of ulna
disk space erosion + increased density of articular plates

clinical.Prognosis: 74% 5-year survival rate; 55% 10-year survival rate; median survival time of 11
